description: The CT Cranium DICOM scan is already loaded in InVesalius 3. Isolate the soft tissue structures (skin, muscle, brain) by subtracting the bone data. Create a 'Wide' mask using a threshold of -200 to 3071 HU and a 'Bone' mask using a threshold of 226 to 3071 HU. Generate a 'Soft Tissue' mask by subtracting the 'Bone' mask from the 'Wide' mask. Create a 3D surface from the 'Soft Tissue' mask and export it as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/soft_tissue_only.stl. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/boolean_masks.inv3.
